training_status: former athlete, bicycle racer, currently sedentary due to illness

benefits.description: Strong reduction in inflammation, anti-inflammatory effects kicked in by day 2
Improved energy and exercise capacity, could work in yard without crashing, able to walk dog 2 miles
Face swelling reduced within a week

side_effects.description: Required increased thyroid medication dosage, feeling cold without increased thyroid meds

protocol_notes: Started at 2mg, titrated to 3mg, then 4mg. Dosing frequency approximately every 5 days based on subjective need. Former athlete with significant functional decline over 10 years due to Hashimoto's and autoimmune disease. Now able to maintain light exercise like dog walking.
